title: Obligation of a partner to contribute.
doc_html:
CHAPTER 2--OBLIGATIONS AND RIGHTS OF PARTNERS

TOWARD EACH OTHER AND TOWARD THE PARTNERSHIP

Art. 2808.  Obligation of a partner to contribute.

Each partner owes the partnership all that he has agreed to contribute to it.

Acts 1980, No. 150, §1.
